findings.title: AIControlRule model binding, fields, enums, and fail-closed authority boundaries are correctly implemented and enforced
findings.evidence: Positive confirmation that model, contract, tests, fixture, validator, weighted defer, Hermes/Claude/inspection gating, and next boundary align.

findings.title: Shared synthetic fixture still self-identifies as RP00.P01.M00.S01 while carrying M02.S01 AIControlRule record
findings.evidence: The fixture is additively extended from the M00 layout subphase and now carries AIControlRule data.
findings.recommendation: Record as non-blocking provenance debt; add per-record provenance when the fixture is next revised.

findings.title: review_required_when is enforced as an all-true constant rather than configurable condition map
findings.evidence: The validator requires all seven review_required_when flags true.
findings.recommendation: Record as an intentional fail-closed posture for this slice; revisit in RP00.P01.M02.S02+ if conditional rules become legitimate.

parsed_review.review_notes: Independent C00 read-only review confirmed RP00.P01.M02.S01 implements AIControlRule only, enforces required fields, air_ stable identifiers, tenant scope, status lifecycle, allowed action enums, all forbidden hard-stops, review_required_when, blocked_claim_refs, audit metadata, synthetic no-real-data/no-write fixture validation, future deferral for HermesGate and later entities, auditable weighted-ledger generator defer, H00/C00/inspection closeout gates, and next boundary RP00.P01.M02.S02. No P0/P1/P2 findings remain.
